title: gpt-image-2
prompt:
Primary request: A clean editorial information-graphic on a warm off-white paper background. Top header reading EXACTLY "FAILURE ISOLATION" in bold modern sans-serif, all caps, deep ink. Below, a small italic subtitle reading EXACTLY "One reference fails. The committee still delivers a verdict." in deep ink. The main composition shows a horizontal flow. On the left, a small uppercase section label reading EXACTLY "REFERENCES" above three reference nodes stacked vertically. The first reference node is a clean colored circular medallion in slate blue containing the recognizable OpenAI flower/knot logo in white/light, labeled to the right reading EXACTLY "REFERENCE 1 · gpt-5.5"; this node is shown in a desaturated/faded state with a thin outline and a clear small badge next to it reading EXACTLY "FAILED" in small caps muted red, and NO outgoing stream from it. The second reference node is a clean colored circular medallion in terracotta containing the recognizable deepseek flame/whale mark logo in white/light, labeled to the right reading EXACTLY "REFERENCE 2 · deepseek-v4-pro". The third reference node is a clean colored circular medallion in sage green containing the recognizable xAI X mark logo in white/light, labeled to the right reading EXACTLY "REFERENCE 3 · grok-4". From the second and third medallions, thin clean colored streams/lines extend rightward and converge into a single larger central circle (the aggregator) in deep warm charcoal with a subtle thin outer ring, labeled reading EXACTLY "AGGREGATOR" with "claude-opus-4.8" beneath. A small label reading EXACTLY "AGGREGATOR" above the circle. From the aggregator, one clean line with a small arrowhead extends to a final element on the far right labeled reading EXACTLY "VERDICT"; a small label reading EXACTLY "VERDICT" above it. Clean precise editorial info-graphic style. Limited warm palette with one muted red accent for the failed badge (slate blue, terracotta, sage green, deep warm charcoal, muted red, warm off-white, deep ink). Crisp legible verbatim text throughout, EXACT title case preserved. Generous whitespace, no decorative noise, no human figures, no robots, no floating logos outside the medallions.
Style/medium: clean editorial information-graphic, precise typography, warm off-white paper background, horizontal pipeline layout, limited warm palette with one muted red accent
